overall.description: The video opens with a brief nighttime rooftop scene before cutting to a daytime walk through a futuristic, post-apocalyptic glass-enclosed skywalk. The camera moves steadily through debris-filled corridors and abandoned lounge areas, revealing a devastated cityscape with burning buildings visible through panoramic windows.

agents.ego_description: walking along an outdoor terrace at night between white walls and illuminated tree planters

entered.detail: tall white walls surrounding the terrace area
small tree growing in a square illuminated planter
illuminated vertical sign with Asian characters visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a nighttime rooftop terrace with white concrete walls and trees in illuminated planters. Neon city signage glows in the background as the camera walks forward along the paved surface.

events.description: abrupt cut from night terrace to daytime post-apocalyptic glass tunnel
slowing approach toward automatic glass doors at end of tunnel section

agents.ego_description: walking through a debris-filled glass tunnel toward a set of automatic doors, with damaged skyscrapers visible outside

entered.detail: curved transparent glass and metal arched structure forming the walkway enclosure
heavily damaged high-rise building with exposed floors and broken facade visible through the glass
double glass doors with metal frames and yellow indicator lights
scattered concrete fragments and broken glass covering the walkway floor

segments.scene_description: Following a hard transition from night to day, the scene reveals a curved glass pedestrian tunnel overlooking a destroyed futuristic city. The walkway is littered with debris and leads toward automatic glass doors at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved glass corridor with abandoned furniture

events.description: passing through automatic doors into the main curved corridor section

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the curved glass tunnel past overturned black leather couches and scattered rubble

entered.detail: overturned and damaged black leather seating furniture lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the main corridor section, passing abandoned black leather couches and debris scattered across the floor. The curved glass walls provide a view of the devastated city outside as the tunnel bends gently to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated lounge bar overlooking destroyed city

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into larger open lounge area with bar counter
smoke plumes and active fires become visible in the destroyed buildings outside

agents.ego_description: moving through the lounge area toward the panoramic windows to observe the burning cityscape

entered.detail: curved wooden bar counter with stools and scattered debris on top
high-rise structure with active fires and black smoke billowing from multiple floors
thick grey smoke rising from various points in the destroyed cityscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a spacious lounge with a bar counter on the right and panoramic glass walls revealing an expansive view of the devastated city. Active fires and smoke plumes are visible in the ruins below as the camera approaches the windows, with the glass arch structure now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene nighttime rooftop into a desolate, daylight view of a ruined futuristic city. It begins on a paved terrace with white concrete walls and illuminated planters under the glow of neon city signage. As the scene shifts abruptly from night to day, the camera enters a curved glass pedestrian tunnel littered with debris and leading toward distant automatic doors. The movement continues through the main corridor, passing abandoned black leather couches as the tunnel bends to the right, keeping the devastated cityscape in view through the glass. Finally, the space opens into a spacious lounge with a bar counter, where the camera approaches panoramic walls to reveal active fires and smoke plumes rising from the ruins below.
